notes: Every critical user journey in inventories/*.e2e-journey.json (e.g. 'first-run to first success', 'purchase', 'recover account'). These verify the product, not single screens. Vars: steps (short journey outline).

steps.title: Specify journey: {name}
steps.description: Write the journey contract for {name}: entry state, steps ({steps}), success signal, and the top 2 failure branches users actually hit.
acceptance_criteria: journey doc with steps + success signal + failure branches

steps.title: Automate journey: {name}
steps.description: Automate {name} end-to-end against a real build (not mocks at the seams users cross): happy path plus both specified failure branches.
acceptance_criteria: green in CI against a production-like build
failure branches asserted with user-visible outcomes

steps.title: Deflake and time-budget journey: {name}
steps.description: Run {name} 10x in CI: eliminate nondeterminism (explicit waits on signals, not sleeps); set a runtime budget so the suite stays fast.

steps.title: Production signal for journey: {name}
steps.description: Define the real-world health signal for {name} (funnel completion rate or synthetic check) so a regression is visible without a bug report.
